result:
1. Spoofable rate-limit key via raw `X-Forwarded-For` read
evidence: `req.headers['x-forwarded-for']` used directly in key
trigger: attacker rotates XFF per request, bypasses per-IP limits (SEV1 2025-09 repro)
fix: key off `trustedClientIp(req)` from `src/edge/util/trustedClientIp.ts`; rely on validated proxy chain, never raw header
verify: lint `no-direct-xff-read` must fail on this diff; integration test with spoofed XFF + fixed `remoteAddress` asserts single bucket

2. Missing `EXPIRE` → Redis OOM
evidence: `redis.incr(key)` with no paired `expire` in same async fn
trigger: unbounded keys accumulate, Redis OOM evicts hot state (SEV2 2025-11 repro); also violates `no-unbounded-redis-key` lint
fix: wrap in `MULTI`, pair `INCR` + `EXPIRE(key, 90)`, read count from `exec()`
verify: integration test asserts `TTL key > 0` after first INCR

3. XFF list not parsed — first hop, not client
evidence: header is CSV `client, proxy1, proxy2`; `||req.ip` fallback masks this
trigger: even if source were trusted, keying on full CSV yields per-chain buckets, not per-client; proxy rotation bypasses limit
fix: use `trustedClientIp(req)` which walks chain against `config/trusted_proxies.json`
verify: unit test with multi-hop XFF asserts leftmost trusted hop selected

4. Missing route prefix + region prefix in key
evidence: key is `rl:{ip}` only; no `{route_prefix}`, no `{minute_bucket}`, no region
trigger: collides across routes (one noisy route throttles all); global bucket not per-region (SEV2 2025-12 repro)
fix: `rl:${region}:${trustedClientIp(req)}:${routePrefix}:${minuteBucket}` per Section 4 spec
verify: regression test from 2025-12 RCA

5. No 429 response path / limit check
evidence: `incr` result unused; no `count > limit` branch, no RFC 7807 body, no `retry_after`
trigger: limiter counts but never throttles — silent failure mode, SLO-invisible
fix: compare `count` to per-route limit from `config/rate_limits.json`, return `problem+json` with `type:/errors/rate-limited`, `retry_after: secondsUntilNextBucket()`
verify: test asserts 429 + body shape on `limit+1`th request

6. CODEOWNERS gate — needs human approval
evidence: diff touches rate-limit logic (implicitly `src/edge/rate_limit.ts`)
trigger: auto-merge blocked per Section 6 pre-merge checks; security-sensitive path
fix: request review from CODEOWNERS before merge; do not bypass
